title: Set up Nginx as a reverse proxy for Node.js / Next.js apps
summary: Configure Nginx as a production reverse proxy with SSL/TLS via Certbot, HTTP/2, gzip, security headers, and rate limiting for Node.js or Next.js on a VPS.
declaration: I will configure Nginx as a reverse proxy for your Node.js or Next.js application, including SSL/TLS via Let's Encrypt (Certbot), HTTP/2, gzip compression, security headers, and rate limiting. This assumes you are deploying to a VPS (Ubuntu/Debian). If you need load balancing across multiple app instances, say so before I begin.
